command:
KEY='/home/jose/.ssh/n8n_bridge'
ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -i $KEY jose@192.168.0.205 '
CONFIG="/home/jose/.config/moreno-unified-delegator/config.json"

echo "=== BACKUP CONFIG ==="
cp $CONFIG ${CONFIG}.pre-timeout-fix

echo "=== UPDATE TIMEOUT 1800->3600, keep_alive 30m->60m ==="
python3 -c "
import json, pathlib
p = pathlib.Path("/home/jose/.config/moreno-unified-delegator/config.json")
d = json.loads(p.read_text())
d["workers"]["primary"]["timeout_seconds"] = 3600
d["workers"]["primary"]["keep_alive"] = "60m"
p.write_text(json.dumps(d, indent=2, sort_keys=True) + "
")
print("Updated: timeout_seconds=", d["workers"]["primary"]["timeout_seconds"])
print("Updated: keep_alive=", d["workers"]["primary"]["keep_alive"])
"

echo "=== VERIFY ==="
python3 -c "
import json
d = json.loads(open("/home/jose/.config/moreno-unified-delegator/config.json").read())
print("primary timeout_seconds:", d["workers"]["primary"]["timeout_seconds"])
print("primary keep_alive:", d["workers"]["primary"]["keep_alive"])
"

echo "=== WRITE TIER-2 TASK RECORD ==="
cat > /home/jose/moreno-tasks/intake/task-timeout-fix-20260625.json << EOF
{
  "task_id": "task-timeout-fix-20260625",
  "created_at": "2026-06-25T13:15:00Z",
  "requested_by": "claude-orchestrator",
  "purpose": "Increase moreno-unified-delegator 3090 timeout 1800->3600s after planning hit timeout on 426-file repo context",
  "failure_evidence": "job-20260625T123626Z-725c302a failed at 13:06:26Z (exactly 1800s after submission)",
  "change": "config.json workers.primary.timeout_seconds: 1800 -> 3600, keep_alive: 30m -> 60m",
  "risk": "low",
  "rollback": "cp config.json.pre-timeout-fix config.json",
  "status": "complete"
}
EOF
echo "task record written"
' 2>&1
echo DONE_1956
